---
title: "Dr. William England"
---

## Dr. William England

**Dates:** (b.1823/4)

### Description

physician

### Biography

See Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 321n.: ‘Dr. England was the family physician.  His son attended Miss Yonge in her last illness.’  His wife’s name was Catherine.

### Letters

- Letter from July 2, 1881.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
